case_title: WHITNEY E. LARSON et al VS. EDWARD DELAO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARSON, WHITNEY E. REYNOLDS, NICHOLAS J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELAO, EDWARD $3,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY LARSON, WHITNEY E. REYNOLDS, NICHOLAS J. AS TO DEFENDANT DELAO, EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED OCT-09-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELAO, EDWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS. PLAINTIFF PRESENT, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE RETAINED, NOTHING ON RECORD. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
